title: Doom Doom
overview: I-na has been putting aside music to handle her tough life; her mentally unstable mother and her baby who is placed with a foster family. One day, she runs into her old friend whom she used to do music with. Being aware of how talented she is, he suggests Ina to participate in 'Berlin Calling' that will give her chance to be a DJ in Berlin.
